tasks.title: [RED] TaskManager tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_task_manager.py: test create_task (UUID gen, submitted state), transition (valid/invalid), cancel_task (terminal→error), subscribe/unsubscribe (queue events), history tracking, concurrent transitions on same task serialized

tasks.title: [GREEN] TaskManager implementation
tasks.description: Implement src/apcore_a2a/server/task_manager.py: TaskManager with _TRANSITIONS dict, per-task asyncio.Lock, create_task, transition, get_task, list_tasks, cancel_task, subscribe/unsubscribe. Exceptions: TaskNotFoundError, TaskNotCancelableError, InvalidStateTransitionError.

tasks.title: [RED] ExecutionRouter tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_execution_router.py: test handle_message_send (success, missing skillId, unknown skill, ApprovalPendingError→input_required, exception→failed, timeout), handle_resume, identity bridging via auth_identity_var

tasks.title: [GREEN] ExecutionRouter implementation
tasks.description: Implement src/apcore_a2a/server/router.py: ExecutionRouter.handle_message_send, handle_message_stream, handle_resume. Duck-type executor. Use asyncio.wait_for for timeout. Bridge auth_identity_var to Context.

tasks.title: [RED] TransportManager tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_transport.py: test handle_jsonrpc dispatch table (all 9 methods + unknown→-32601), Content-Type validation (415), body limit (413), JSON parse error (-32700), JSON-RPC structure (-32600), handle_agent_card, handle_health

tasks.title: [GREEN] TransportManager implementation
tasks.description: Implement src/apcore_a2a/server/transport.py: TransportManager with Starlette Request handling, JSON-RPC dispatch, _ok_response/_error_response envelopes, handle_agent_card (Cache-Control: max-age=300), handle_health

tasks.title: [RED] A2AServerFactory tests
tasks.description: Write tests/server/test_server_factory.py: test create() returns (Starlette, agent_card), routes registered (/.well-known/agent.json, /, /health), AuthMiddleware applied when auth provided, CORSMiddleware applied when cors_origins provided

tasks.title: [GREEN] A2AServerFactory implementation

tasks.title: [REFACTOR] Server core cleanup
